final:
module top_module(
   input [4:0] RmIn,
	input [4:0] RtIn,
	input  Select,
	output reg [4:0] rrA2Out 
    );always @ (RmIn,RtIn,Select)
		case(Select)
			0: rrA2Out <= RmIn;
			1: rrA2Out <= RtIn; 
		endcase
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      rrA2Out <= RmIn & ~Select;
      rrA2Out <= RtIn & Select;
    end
  end

endmodule
